name: Important Windows Event Auditing Disabled
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Important Windows Event Auditing Disabled
SIGMA Description: Detects scenarios where system auditing for important events such as "Process Creation" or "Logon" events is disabled.

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4719 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9210-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9211-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9212-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9215-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce921b-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce922b-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce922f-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9230-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9235-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9236-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9237-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce923f-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9240-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9242-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%') AND (UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8448%' OR UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8450%')) OR ("Event ID"=4719 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9217-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' AND UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8448%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Important Windows Event Auditing Disabled on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4719 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9210-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9211-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9212-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9215-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce921b-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce922b-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce922f-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9230-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9235-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9236-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9237-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce923f-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9240-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9242-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%') AND (UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8448%' OR UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8450%')) OR ("Event ID"=4719 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9217-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' AND UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8448%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Important Windows Event Auditing Disabled
